title: Absolutio - Erlösung im Blut
overview: Isaiah sees sin everywhere. When his mother dies, he feels called to free mankind from sin. For this all means are right. He quickly abducts sinners and forces them to confess, torturing them. He then relieves his victims when they have begged for mercy. But Isaiah's delusion are getting worse.
